version_description: Chords based on the Pro Tab.

versions.version_description: Transposed for a baritone vocalist. View the entire song on one page whether viewing online or a printed page. Chord changes located relative to the vocals. Cheers.

Gorgeous tribute to Roy Orbison from J.D. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes as there are many passing chords and nuances. Chorus and interlude play as intro. Outro plays as refrain with ad-libs fading out over the last chords.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Have You Ever Seen The Rain

content:

[ch]A[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
[ch]A[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
 When the world is ready to fall[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
 On your little shoulders[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]     [ch]D6[/ch]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
 And when you're feeling lonely and small[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]     [ch]D6[/ch]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
   You need somebody there to hold you[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
 You can call out my name[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
 When you're only lonely[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
 Now don't you ever be ashamed[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
 You're only lonely[/tab]
[ch]A[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
 When you need somebody around[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
 On the nights that try you, remember[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]       [ch]D6[/ch]         [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
 I was there when you were a queen[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]           [ch]D6[/ch]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
  And I'll be the last one there beside you[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
 So you can call out my name[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
 When you're only lonely[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
 Now don't you ever be ashamed[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]

            Ooooh,[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]
 When the world is ready to fall[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
 On your little shoulders[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]     [ch]D6[/ch]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]

[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
 So don't you ever be ashamed[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
 When you're only lonely[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]

[Bridge]
[tab]                                       [ch]F#m[/ch]
(You're only lonely) when you're only lonely...[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]D[/ch]
(You're only lonely) ooh, it's no crime...[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Darling, we've got lots of time, whoa...[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]F#m[/ch]
 (You're only lonely) Whoa....[/tab]
[tab]                                                     [ch]D[/ch]
 (You're only lonely) No, there's nothing wrong with you[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
Darling, i get lonely, too....[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
 (You're only lonely)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
 (You're only lonely)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
So if you need me[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]E[/ch]
All you got to do is call me[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]
Ah, You're only loooo......nely (You're only lonely)[/tab]
